      Enum Class
      Description
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Comments.NodeType
      Use NodeRole instead.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Comments.add(Block<?>, Comments.NodeType, Comments.Position, List<CommentLine>)
      Replaced by Comments.add(Block, NodeRole, Position, List) and subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Comments.add(Block<?>, Comments.NodeType, Comments.Position, CommentLine)
      Replaced by Comments.add(Block, NodeRole, Position, CommentLine) and subject for removal.

      Replaced by Comments.get(Block, NodeRole, Position) and subject for removal.

      Replaced by Comments.remove(Block, NodeRole, Position) and subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.block.Comments.set(Block<?>, Comments.NodeType, Comments.Position, List<CommentLine>)
      Replaced by Comments.set(Block, NodeRole, Position, List) and subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.dvs.Pattern.getPart(int)
      Method with confusing name, use Pattern.getSegment(int) instead. Subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.dumper.DumperSettings.Builder.setStringStyle(ScalarStyle)
      Replaced by DumperSettings.Builder.setScalarFormatter(Formatter).
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.updater.UpdaterSettings.Builder.setIgnoredRoutes(String, Set<Route>)
      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.updater.UpdaterSettings.Builder.setIgnoredRoutes(Map<String, Set<Route>>)
      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.

      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.updater.UpdaterSettings.Builder.setIgnoredStringRoutes(Map<String, Set<String>>)
      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.

      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.updater.UpdaterSettings.Builder.setRelocations(Map<String, Map<Route, Route>>)
      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.

      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.
      dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.updater.UpdaterSettings.Builder.setStringRelocations(Map<String, Map<String, String>>)
      Method with confusing name, use addX() instead of setX(). Subject for removal.

      replaced by YamlDocument.setSettings(Settings...) and subject for removal
